slaTargets.corePrinciple: Underpromise and overdeliver. Never commit to specific timeframes in guest messages without checking with the team first to ensure we can deliver.

guestFirstResponse.rationale: Sets the tone for the entire stay. For inquiries, this is a hot lead — the longer we take, the more time they have to shop around and book elsewhere.

urgentMaintenanceNotification.note: Team notification is immediate. Actual intervention is based on planning and urgency. Do not promise specific ETAs to guests.

nonUrgentMaintenanceNotification.note: Same principle — notify immediately, intervene based on planning.

ownerInquiryResponse.note: Unless the owner flags it as urgent

steps: Guest reports issue or team identifies it during inspection
Franny is notified and assesses urgency
Bryan is dispatched (both north and west regions)
For west properties: Alex coordinates on-site access and logistics
If spending required above Rs 5,000: Franny escalates to Ishant (or Mathias if Ishant unavailable)
Issue resolved, guest notified of resolution
Case logged in reservation notes

cancellationFees.rule: Friday keeps 100% of cancellation fees — no owner split
cancellationFees.surfacing: Do NOT surface proactively to owners
cancellationFees.disputes: Case-by-case if an owner ever raises it — hasn't happened yet

currencyHandling.guestPayments: EUR (sometimes cash MUR or USD, or wire to USD/EUR accounts)
currencyHandling.exchangeRate: Monthly weighted average across all payments received that month
currencyHandling.automation: Currently eyeballed — future: Judith computes real weighted average from actual payment dates

payoutTiming.payoutWindow: Within 7 days after month-end (e.g., March checkouts paid by April 7)
payoutTiming.statements: Monthly statements sent by email within first 7 days of following month

ownerCommunication.philosophy: Minimal communication. Only essentials. Don't disturb — owners should feel it's truly passive. More comms = more surface area for complaints/requests.
ownerCommunication.monthly: Statements sent by email within first 7 days of following month
ownerCommunication.dayToDay: Per-owner WhatsApp group (Mary, Mathias, Ishant, Franny + owner). Ad hoc only.

approvalFlows.pricingAndListings: Friday decides, no owner approval needed

steps: Lead comes in → share brochure/presentation → answer questions
Site visit
Standards book shared — must be understood and accepted BEFORE signing
Agreement signed (Eversign)
Onboarding document given post-signing
Key handover (in person)
Friday provides: lockbox, bathroom/kitchen/laundry dispensers, professional photoshoot, linen (from June 2026)
Listing setup by Friday
onboardingFlow.gaps: Standards book and onboarding document need formalization — some exist, some don't. Future project.

linenService.model: Staff bring fresh linen from central store, swap dirty, return dirty for laundry
linenService.currentModel: Done on-site, problematic — next-day return trip needed

steps: Breezeway auto-creates cleaning + post-clean inspection tasks per booking
Judith does weekly planning — assigns times, dates, cleaners via Breezeway
Guest leaves → cleaners arrive → clean
Place SRL (Stay Ready List): shampoo, body gel, soap, laundry detergent, chocolate, 1 water, 1 Coke, 1 Fanta, small chocolate pack (x3), sugar, salt
Post-clean inspection by Bryan/Alex
